_comment: config.example.json for Analyst and Review Platform Tracker

OUR_COMPANY_NAME.description: Your company name as it appears in snapshot data. Must match exactly.

TRACKER_SCHEDULE.description: Cron expression for weekly run (default: Monday 08:00)

notes: No LLM credential required. G2 and Capterra do not have official APIs. Live data fetching requires custom HTTP Request nodes — see README section 12.
